description: Cierre — manos del niño sostienen el libro (autonomía lectora). Dolly out revela madre e hijo juntos. CTA + logo.
prompt_string: Cinematic 9:16 vertical video, intimate close-up detail shot of small child's hands independently holding an open illustrated storybook, then mother's hand gently enters frame from the right side pointing at a page illustration, slow smooth dolly out over 5 seconds gradually revealing the full scene of mother and 4-year-old son sitting together on a couch reading in a warm Chilean home, evening golden lamp light creating warm atmosphere, bookshelf slightly out of focus in background, child's backpack on floor and books stacked irregularly for authentic lived-in feeling, handheld gentle movement, Fuji Eterna warm film grade, ambient string music with piano fading out, intimate closing moment of connection between parent and child
negative_prompt: abrupt ending, stock footage, studio setup, white background, forced pose, plastic skin, 6 fingers, harsh lighting, sterile environment, neon effects, oversaturated, cartoon
